_comment_intent: Project-level allowlist for Claude Code subagents. Per Claude Code issues #18950 + #28584, subagents do NOT inherit user-level permissions starting v2.1.56; every tool call prompts unless this project's settings.json explicitly allows it.
_comment_compound: Per Claude Code permission docs (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions.md), the matcher splits compound commands at shell operators (|, &&, ;, ||) and checks each subcommand independently. Redirects (>, >>, 2>&1) stay attached to the parent command. To make `cargo test ... | grep foo` work, BOTH `cargo *` AND `grep *` must be allowed.
_comment_eval_order: Evaluation order is deny → ask → allow (deny always wins). Specific destructive commands are denied; safe build/inspection/text-processing tools are allowed.
_comment_scope: Write/Edit are path-scoped to the wat-rs tree. Bash destructive commands (rm/mv/cp/chmod/chown/curl/wget/sudo) are denied — orchestrator (main session) handles those if needed. Subagents that think they need rm should use `mktemp + trap cleanup EXIT` instead.
